_meta.name: English
_meta.note: Reference catalog. Keys follow area.component.label. {name} = interpolation; an object of CLDR categories ({ one, other, … }) is a plural form selected by a numeric `count` param.

app.wsDesktopOnly: WebSocket connections require the Rest Hippo desktop app.
app.requestCancelledHint: The request was cancelled by the user.
app.noUrlHint: Enter a URL in the request bar before sending.
app.exportDesktopOnly: Export is only available in the desktop app.
app.importDesktopOnly: Import is only available in the desktop app.
app.wsCloseMessage: "{label}" has an open connection. Keep it running in the background, or disconnect now?

resthippoWorkspaceExported.one: {count} collection exported as Rest Hippo v1.
resthippoWorkspaceExported.other: {count} collections exported as Rest Hippo v1.

runFolder.title: Run Folder
runFolder.empty: This folder has no requests to run.

noTests.one: Ran {count} request in “{name}” — no tests defined.
noTests.other: Ran {count} requests in “{name}” — no tests defined.

app.exportedAsHarEmpty: "{name}" exported as HAR — no run history yet, so the archive is empty.
app.workspaceExportedAsHarEmpty: Workspace exported as HAR — no run history yet, so the archive is empty.
app.importErrNotJsonYaml: File is not valid JSON or YAML.
app.importErrUnrecognized: Unrecognized format. Supported: Postman v2.x, Insomnia v3/v4/v5, OpenAPI 3.x, Swagger 2.0, HAR 1.2.
app.importErrCurlNoUrl: No URL found in the cURL command.

discard.title: Discard changes?
discard.body: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?

dialog.deleteNote: Take a backup beforehand if you may need to restore it — this cannot be undone otherwise.

unresolvedVars.title: Unresolved Variables
unresolvedVars.desc: One or more variable placeholders in this request could not be resolved. Review the values below before proceeding.

dialog.exportDetailPassword: Secrets are included and encrypted with your password.
dialog.exportDetailMachine: Secrets are included and encrypted to this machine.
dialog.exportDetailNone: Secrets were removed from this backup.
dialog.invalidBackup: The selected file is not a valid Rest Hippo backup.
dialog.readBackupFailed: Could not read the backup file.
dialog.fatalErrorMsg: An unexpected error occurred and Rest Hippo needs to close.
dialog.fatalErrorLogHint:
Details were written to the log in:
{path}
dialog.unhandledRejectionMsg: An unexpected error occurred. Rest Hippo will keep running.

kv.bulkEditorTitle: Toggle between bulk text editor and key/value row editor
kv.name: Name
kv.varsHint: One  name=value  per line · prefix  $  for secure

menu.importCollectionTooltip: Import a collection from a file — Postman & Insomnia (.json/.yaml), OpenAPI 3 / Swagger 2.0 (.json/.yaml), or HAR 1.2 (.har)

appearance.useMethodIconsTitle: Show an icon for each HTTP method instead of its name
appearance.showRecentsTitle: Show a Recent tab of recently used requests in the collections sidebar
appearance.showUrlPreviewTitle: Show the resolved URL preview bar above the Params editor
appearance.removeHeadersOnTitle: When headers are shown, the settings icon will move to the top right corner
appearance.removeHeadersOffTitle: When headers are hidden, the settings icon will move to the bottom left corner

request.streamNdjsonTitle: When an application/x-ndjson response is received, consume it live (line by line) instead of buffering the whole body
request.showCapturesTabTitle: When off, the Captures tab is hidden and capture rules are not run after a response
request.showScriptsTabTitle: When off, the Scripts tab is hidden and pre-request and after-response scripts are not executed
request.showTestsTabTitle: When off, the Tests tab is hidden and no-code assertions are not run after a response

proxy.help: The proxy type is taken from the URL scheme: http://, https://, or socks5:// / socks4://.
proxy.bypassHelp: Comma- or newline-separated hosts that connect directly. Supports suffixes (example.com), globs (*.internal), and * for all.

certificates.clientHelp: Present a client certificate to hosts that require mutual TLS (mTLS). The first entry whose host matches is used.
certificates.caHelp: Trust extra CA certificates alongside the system roots, so privately-signed hosts validate with verification still on.
certificates.insecureHelp: Comma- or newline-separated hosts whose TLS certificate is not verified. Use only for trusted self-signed hosts; prefer a custom CA above.

security.heading: Secret storage
security.help: Choose how Rest Hippo encrypts secrets — passwords, tokens, and keys — on this device. Switching re-encrypts every stored secret.

mode.appKeyDesc: Encrypt with a key kept on this device. No system prompts — but anyone who can read this computer's files could read your secrets.
mode.osKeychainDesc: Encrypt with your operating system's keychain. Strongest protection, but the OS may prompt for access.
mode.masterPasswordDesc: Encrypt with a password you choose. Secrets stay locked until you unlock them each session. If you forget it, they cannot be recovered.

security.lockedNote: Secrets are locked. Enter your master password to unlock them for this session.
security.setPasswordWarn: If you forget this password, your stored secrets cannot be recovered.
security.switchMessage: This re-encrypts every stored secret with the new method. Continue?
security.unlockIntro: Enter your master password to unlock your stored secrets for this session.

error.migrationFailed: Some secrets couldn't be converted, so the storage method was left unchanged.
error.keychainUnavailable: The OS keychain isn't available on this system.
error.lockedSwitch: Unlock your secrets first, then switch storage method.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

cli.desc: Add the hippo command to your PATH so you can launch Rest Hippo from a terminal.
cli.notInstalled: The hippo command is not installed.
cli.unavailable: The command-line launcher is only available in the installed app.
cli.installedToast: Installed — type hippo in a terminal to launch Rest Hippo.
cli.installedPathNote: Installed to {dir}, but it isn't on your PATH yet. Add it to use the hippo command.
cli.errorPermission: Couldn't write the hippo command — permission denied.
cli.promptMessage: Would you like to type hippo in a terminal to launch Rest Hippo? You can change this anytime in Settings → Command Line.

url.previewPlaceholder: Enter a URL above to preview it here

ws.label: WebSocket
ws.hint: Connect first, then send. ⌘/Ctrl+Enter to send.

notes.placeholder: Add freeform notes about this request…

bodyType.noneMessage: No body will be sent with this request.

fields.empty: No fields — click  +  to add one.

graphql.varsInvalid: Variables JSON has a syntax error
graphql.resizeAria: Resize the Query and Variables panes
graphql.noUrlMessage: Enter the GraphQL endpoint URL before fetching its schema.
graphql.parseFailed: Could not parse the introspection schema.
graphql.typesAvailable: {count} types available — right-click to view or download the schema
graphql.renderFailed: The fetched schema could not be rendered. Try fetching it again.
graphql.fetchSchemaTitle: Run GraphQL introspection against the URL to enable query autocomplete
graphql.schemaWarn: Validation is limited until the schema has been fetched
graphql.queryValidSchema: Query is valid against the schema
graphql.querySyntaxValid: Query syntax is valid — fetch the schema for full validation
graphql.errExecuteUnavailable: The HTTP engine is unavailable — rebuild the app to enable schema introspection.
graphql.errNotJson: Introspection response was not valid JSON.
graphql.errGraphqlRejected: GraphQL introspection was rejected by the server.

headers.empty: No headers — click  +  to add one.
headers.suggestTitle: Show standard header suggestions when editing the header name

params.empty: No parameters — click  +  to add one.

pathParams.label: Path parameter
pathParams.incompleteBody: A path parameter has a blank name. Name every path parameter (or remove its token from the URL) before sending.

oauth.failedBefore: OAuth token acquisition failed before the request could be sent.
oauth.failedCheck: OAuth token acquisition failed. Check your OAuth configuration in the Auth tab.

captures.empty: No captures — click  +  to add one.
captures.hint: After a response, extract a value and write it into a variable scope so later requests can use it as {{name}}. Use the Codes column to pick which response codes each rule fires on — e.g. capture a token on 2xx, an error on 4xx.

tests.empty: No assertions — click  +  to add one.
tests.hint: After a response, each assertion checks a value (status, response time, a header, the body, or a JSON-path value) against a matcher. Results show on the response Tests tab. For scripted assertions, use hippo.test() on the Scripts tab.

curlPaste.title: Replace request from cURL
curlPaste.confirm: Replace this request with the pasted cURL command? Its method, URL, parameters, headers, body and authentication will be overwritten.
curlPaste.applied: Request updated from the cURL command.

cookies.name: Name
cookies.empty: No cookies were set by this response

filter.label: Filter
filter.unsupported: The displayed MIME type or body style does not support filtering.

truncation.previewHint: Large response — use "View full" above to preview.
truncation.hexNote: Showing the first {shown} of {total} — use Save to file for the full body.
truncation.banner: Large response — showing the first {shown} of {total}.
truncation.notCached: Full response is no longer cached.

timeline.selectEntry: Select an entry to see the request that was sent

placeholder.sendRequest: Send a request to see the response
placeholder.consoleEmpty: Verbose output from each request will appear here
placeholder.testsEmpty: No assertions ran for this request
placeholder.historyEmpty: No history yet — send a request to record an entry
placeholder.pdfDesktop: PDF preview is available in the desktop app — use Save to file.

streamHint.ndjson: Live streaming is off for this NDJSON response. Enable it under Settings → Request → “Stream NDJSON responses live”.

tree.copyFailedBody: Unable to write to the clipboard. Please try again.
tree.curlCopied: The cURL command has been copied to your clipboard.

collections.title: Collections
collections.nameExists: A collection with this name already exists.

delete.title: Delete Collection?
delete.message: Delete the collection "{name}" and all its requests?

collections.variablesEmpty: No variables — click  +  to add one.

cookie.clearTitle: Clear all — remove every cookie in this collection's jar
cookie.attach: Attach this collection's cookies to every request it sends

environments.title: Environments
environments.nameExists: An environment with this name already exists.
environments.deleteMessage: Delete the environment "{name}" and all its variables?

cookies.selectCollection: Select a collection to manage its cookies.
cookies.empty: No cookies stored for this collection.
cookies.clearMessage: Remove every cookie stored for this collection? Subsequent requests will send no cookies until new ones are captured. This cannot be undone.

export.title: Export
export.introCollection: Export this collection to a file. Interchange formats redact secrets; the native Rest Hippo format keeps them, protected by a password.
export.introWorkspace: Export every collection to a single file (not the encrypted backup). Interchange formats redact secrets; the native Rest Hippo format keeps them, protected by a password.

format.postmanDesc: Postman collection. Re-imports into Postman and Rest Hippo.
format.insomniaDesc: Insomnia export. Re-imports into Insomnia and Rest Hippo.
format.openapiDesc: OpenAPI 3.0 description of the requests (best-effort, lossy).
format.harDesc: Recorded exchanges from the most recent run of each request.
format.resthippoDesc: Native Rest Hippo archive. Full-fidelity restore, including environments. Re-imports only into Rest Hippo.

backup.createIntro: Back up all collections, environments and settings to a single file. Choose how to handle secrets (passwords, tokens and keys).
backup.restoreIntro: Choose how to apply this backup to your workspace.
backup.passwordHint: This backup is password-protected. Enter the password to recover its secrets. Leave it blank to restore without secrets — secured variables are kept but their values are cleared.

mode.redactedDesc: Remove all secrets. Safe to share or move between machines.
mode.machineDesc: Keep secrets encrypted with this machine's keystore. Restores only on this machine.
mode.passwordProtectedDesc: Keep secrets encrypted with a password. Restores anywhere using that password.
mode.mergeDesc: Add the backup's items to your workspace. Items with the same id are overwritten.
mode.replaceDesc: Delete all current collections and environments first, then restore only the backup.

error.readFailed: Could not read the backup file.
error.passwordRequired: Enter a password to protect this backup.

auth.discoverTitle: Discover OAuth 2.0 endpoints from an OpenID Connect issuer URL
auth.enabledTitle: Enable or disable authentication for this request
auth.noneMessage: No authentication will be sent with this request.
auth.decryptFailed: Couldn't decrypt — re-enter this value to restore it.

apiKey.name: Key
apiKey.nameHint: Header (or query) name for the key — pick a common name or type your own

comment.uppercase: The uppercase variant of the de-facto standard.
comment.token: Frequently used when the key serves as a long-lived security token.

digest.hint: Challenge/response (RFC 2617 / 7616) is negotiated when the request is sent.

ntlm.hint: The NTLM handshake (MS-NLMP) is negotiated over a single keep-alive connection when the request is sent.

oauth2.redirectUriHint: Callback URL registered with your OAuth provider (intercepted by Rest Hippo)
oauth2.scopeHint: Space-separated list of requested scopes — type or pick from the list
oauth2.headerPrefixHint: Overrides the default 'Bearer' token prefix in the Authorization header
oauth2.copyFailed: Could not copy the token to the clipboard.
oauth2.clearSessionTitle: Clear stored token and — in Electron — erase all session cookies and browser storage so the next login flow starts fresh.
oauth2.clearSessionFailed: Could not clear the saved OAuth login session.
oauth2.getTokenTitle: Acquire an OAuth 2.0 access token using the configured settings
oauth2.deviceAuthorizationUrlHint: Endpoint that issues the device and user codes (RFC 8628).

device.title: Device Authorization
device.desc: To sign in, open this URL on any device and enter the code:
device.expires: The code expires in about {minutes} min.

discoverDialog.title: Discover OpenID Configuration
discoverDialog.desc: Enter the issuer URL to fetch the OpenID Connect discovery document (.well-known/openid-configuration). Supported endpoints, grant types, PKCE support, and available scopes will be applied automatically.

oauth1.hint: Signed when the request is sent; the nonce and timestamp are generated automatically.

wsConsole.empty: No frames yet. Connect, then send a message to see it echoed here.

themeEditor.emptyState: Select a theme to edit, or create a new one.
themeEditor.saveFailed:
Could not save your themes: {message}

Your changes have not been persisted.

curlImport.title: Import from cURL
curlImport.intro: Paste a cURL command — for example a browser's “Copy as cURL” or a snippet from API docs — and Rest Hippo turns it into a request.
curlImport.empty: Paste a cURL command to import.

urlImport.title: Import from URL
urlImport.intro: Enter the URL of an OpenAPI or Swagger document and Rest Hippo fetches it and turns it into a collection. The fetch runs through the desktop request engine, so there are no browser CORS limits.
urlImport.errScheme: Enter an http or https URL.
urlImport.errNotOpenApi: The URL didn't return an OpenAPI or Swagger document.

swaggerImport.title: Import OpenAPI / Swagger
swaggerImport.intro: OpenAPI and Swagger operations are relative paths, so Rest Hippo prefixes every imported request with a base-URL variable. Choose its name and value — the value can be left blank and filled in later.

passwordPrompt.exportIntro: This collection contains secrets (passwords, tokens, or secure variables). Choose a password to encrypt them — you'll need it to import the archive.
passwordPrompt.importIntro: This archive's secrets are password-protected. Enter the password to restore them.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.find: Find in response, or filter the sidebar
shortcuts.filter: Filter the response body (JSON / YAML / XML)
shortcuts.delete: Delete the request or folder (asks to confirm)

script.prePlaceholder:
// Runs before the request is sent
// hippo.variables.set("environment", "token", "abc123")
script.postPlaceholder:
// Runs after the response arrives
// hippo.variables.set("global", "id", hippo.response.json().id)
script.ambiguousRequest: More than one request is named "{name}" — ran the first match.

updater.failedMsg: Could not check for updates. Please try again later.
updater.devBuild: Updates are only available in installed builds.
